if she says yes

hiii, cacu!

let me introduce myself again. my name is Garry, or who's often called "gyyy" by u. kaget ngga i made something like this? congrats, u got the first gift from this personality. remember i always say i can fulfill all 5 love languages. so no matter what ur love language is, i'll give all 5 of em. or should i make it 6??? gausah senyum-senyum deh.

first of all, thank you yaa udah say yes and decide to go out with this one bekasi man who knows u less than a week and drove all the way to tangerang to pick u up. like i said before, distance is not a matter, even if it costs anything, still not a problem for me. as long as i can make u and myself happy, i'll make everything worth it.

like i said at the beginning, just for today, be urself okay? whether u wanna match my energy or just do ur thing, just be u. and i will be myself too kokk. the point of me askin u to hang out is i just want to know u better, so do u right? walaupun kita udah sering banget call ya HAHAHA tapi it's okay, belum tentu di online sama kayak offline kan? yaa ngga?

caa, don't worry kok. i will not rush u. i'm also still figuring things out about u too. and so is the future. jadi kaya let's take our time to know each other, and maybe one day, let's figure this out together?

okayy buat paragraf penutup, just be urself and enjoy the date okay!! and mmm, check the playlist below too!!!

if she says no

hiii, cacu!

a lil sad, but it's okay kokk!!! and i 100% get it. maybe it feels a little bit rushed. kaya terlalu cepet aja, if i were u juga pasti mikir beberapa kali, karena yaa who am i? still a stranger to u. dan kaya yaudah, no need to feel sorry if u felt kaya jahat gituu. i'm completely okayyyy kokkkk, i swearr!!!

tapi yaa u know, this man still got his npd side. jadi dia ngga bakal stop here.

i hope one day, we can hang out, okay??
